/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/ur_rtde_cmake_example.dir/main.cpp.o -o ur_rtde_cmake_example  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/librtde.so.1.6.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.83.0
